identity: Human male mage, young adult early 30s (NOT old, NOT elderly, NOT gray-haired, NOT a graybeard wizard), short red-brown hair and a trimmed red beard, smooth unwrinkled skin, brown eyes, focused face.
outfit: Deep blue hooded robe with bright gold trim down the front seam and around the hood, gold-bordered collar.
weapons: A dark wooden staff with a polished wooden orb at the top, held in the right hand at his side.
attackStyle: East-facing. Staff raised overhead in right hand, left hand thrust forward casting a bolt of golden arcane light, robe billowing.
spellStyle: East-facing. Staff planted vertically in the right hand, left hand held forward with a small glowing blue arcane rune above the palm.
blockStyle: East-facing. Staff held horizontally across the chest in both hands, hood up, faint arcane shimmer around him.
koStyle: East-facing, kneeling, staff fallen beside him, head bowed, hood slumped.
southStyle: Facing camera (south), calm idle. Staff held upright in the right hand, left hand at his side, hood up, beard visible.
portraitStyle: Bust shot from mid-chest up, three-quarter view. Deep blue hood with gold trim, red-brown hair and red beard, dark wooden staff with wooden orb visible over the right shoulder.

referenceSheet.prompt:
IDENTITY (this image becomes the canonical identity anchor — preserve in every downstream frame): Human male mage, young adult early 30s (NOT old, NOT elderly, NOT gray-haired, NOT a graybeard wizard), short red-brown hair and a trimmed red beard, smooth unwrinkled skin, brown eyes, focused face.

OUTFIT: Deep blue hooded robe with bright gold trim down the front seam and around the hood, gold-bordered collar.

WEAPONS: A dark wooden staff with a polished wooden orb at the top, held in the right hand at his side.

CLASS: humanoid. Full-body view, head to feet visible. Character occupies ~70% of the canvas height. Feet aligned near the bottom; headroom above.

POSE: full-body side profile facing right (east), calm combat-ready idle. Head up, eyes visible. NOT a portrait bust, NOT a close-up — entire character from head to feet.

STYLE: detailed pixel art with clean readable silhouette, warm pixel-art palette, transparent background, no ground shadow.

portrait.prompt:
IDENTITY (must match reference sheet exactly): Human male mage, young adult early 30s (NOT old, NOT elderly, NOT gray-haired, NOT a graybeard wizard), short red-brown hair and a trimmed red beard, smooth unwrinkled skin, brown eyes, focused face.

OUTFIT: Deep blue hooded robe with bright gold trim down the front seam and around the hood, gold-bordered collar.

WEAPONS: A dark wooden staff with a polished wooden orb at the top, held in the right hand at his side.

POSE (portrait): Bust shot from mid-chest up, three-quarter view. Deep blue hood with gold trim, red-brown hair and red beard, dark wooden staff with wooden orb visible over the right shoulder.

FRAMING: bust shot from mid-chest up, three-quarter view, centered in a 256x256 canvas, shoulders fill the lower third.

SCALE (non-negotiable): character must occupy approximately 180px of the 256px canvas height — roughly 70%. Do NOT stretch or upscale. Extra space above head and/or below feet is correct.

STYLE: pixel art, transparent background, no ground shadow, no borders, no text. Match the palette and style of the reference sheet.

NEGATIVE: do not add weapons or props not listed in WEAPONS. Do not change palette, species, or outfit from the reference sheet. Do not zoom in — respect SCALE.
